_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: Both brains agree on upward resolution as extreme fear mean-reverts and institutional ETF flows front-run retail skepticism, with the immediate next rung being Disbelief before potentially reaching Hope.
next_move.brains_agree: Partially; both agree on UP direction but analyst's Hope call exceeds the ±1 rung limit from Complacency, so consensus adjusted to Disbelief as the legal next step
next_move.confirmed_if: BTC breaks $67k with sustained ETF inflows and funding stays below 0.015%
next_move.invalidated_if: BTC closes below $60k with VIX spiking above 22 and funding flipping deeply negative
